goal: All Sprint 3 data-fetching hooks exist, are type-safe, and follow the project's query patterns.
summary: Query Hooks phase complete. Created posts.ts with 5 hooks (useFeedPosts with useInfiniteQuery and following filter, usePostLikeStatus, useCreatePost, useLikePost with optimistic updates, useUnlikePost with optimistic updates). Created comments.ts with 2 hooks (useComments with author join, useAddComment). Created follows.ts with 4 hooks (useFollows returning Set, useIsFollowing, useFollow, useUnfollow). All files pass TypeScript compilation with 0 errors.

  3. Create src/queries/follows.ts with useFollows, useFollow, useUnfollow, and useIsFollowing(followingId) [verified]
  4. Type-check the project to ensure new hooks compile [verified]
